law decentralization is global order as the fixed point of LOCAL rules with no controller; erpax achieves it by content-addressing — the [[merge]] law IS stigmergy: each peer recomputes the content-[[uuid]] from the row itself, so same content ⇒ same id with nothing in the middle to capture.
